en.title: Resume optimization
en.prompt: I'm going to provide you with a job description for a job I'm interested to apply for. You're going to read the job description and understand the key requirements for the position – including years of experience, skills, position name. After that I'm going to give you my resume. You'll go over it and provide feedback based on how tailored my resume is for the job. Do you understand?
en.remark: Tailor and customize your position and resume for optimal optimization. Contributed by @uteundilse.

related.title: Short Story
related.remark: Write a short story using the few words you provide. Contributed by @LIyvqi.

related.title: Unrestricted ChatGPT
related.remark: 2023.06.10 Downgraded, unable to fully hack. Unlock ChatGPT 3.5 developer mode. Contributed by @Songxuan11.

metaDescription: Applying for a job? Analyze the job description and your resume. Get feedback on how well your resume matches the role. Try it now.

faq.q: Will the AI stuff keywords into the resume per the JD?
faq.a: Yes, and it will fabricate experience you don't have. Verify every added item, especially numbers and project names. To match the JD the AI plants keywords mechanically (SEO-stuffing) which reads unnaturally and actually hurts.

faq.q: Is it appropriate to customize multiple resume versions at once?
faq.a: You can have it rewrite in separate passes. Against 3 different JDs have the AI customize 3 versions of the same resume, asking each time "what was changed to match the JD." Time-efficient and you can see targeted optimization logic while learning the method.
